userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 6.1 Not possible in VCON to book Float Float XXCY
MW id 7.1 Not possible in VCON to have fixing calendar different than payment calendar
MW id 7.2 Not possible in VCON to have fixing calendar different than payment calendar
Pay JPY LIBOR 3M on floating leg 150,000,000 Receive USD LIBOR 3M on floating leg 150,000,000 Expiry 16 jun 2016
No Jurisdiction.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.

templateID.templateDescription: MIG MW RESET: JPY LIB3M-USD LIB3M
